changes.reason: Add a distinct high-value canonical article for generic iPhone/iPad Bluetooth accessory pairing failures, backed by current Apple China support pages.

queries: 蓝牙配件无法连接 iPhone iPad
Bluetooth accessory won't connect iPhone iPad
发现模式 忽略此设备 蓝牙权限
rg 蓝牙 Bluetooth 配件 无法连接 无法配对 忽略此设备 发现模式
canonicalReview.notes: Existing matches cover AirPods-specific pairing, audio routing, and Personal Hotspot Bluetooth dependency; none cover generic third-party Bluetooth accessory discovery, app Bluetooth permission, forget-device, compatibility, and Apple Support escalation for iPhone/iPad.
